name: NATIONAL BANKSHARES INC
business: National Bankshares, Inc. is a financial holding company that conducts most of its operations through its wholly-owned community bank subsidiary, The National Bank of Blacksburg, which offers a full range of retail and commercial banking services to individuals, businesses, non-profits and local governments. The bank also provides trust and wealth management services, and its subsidiary National Bankshares Financial Services, Inc. offers non-deposit investment and insurance products. The company's primary source of revenue is net interest income from lending activities, focusing on small to mid-sized businesses and individuals.

exposures.sentence: Consumers may increasingly decide not to use the Bank to process their financial transactions, which would have a material adverse impact on the Company's financial condition and operations.
The cost of these measures was $409 for 2025 and $365 for 2024.

catalysts.event: New branch opened in Roanoke, Virginia
catalysts.sentence: Through 28 banking locations across southwest, western and central Virginia, including a new branch opened in 2025 in Roanoke, Virginia, a recently upgraded Lynchburg, Virginia location and a loan production office in Charlottesville, Virginia, NBB offers a full range of retail and commercial banking services...

catalysts.event: Core system conversion completed in second quarter 2025
catalysts.sentence: The core system conversion was completed during the second quarter of 2025 positioning the Company for future growth.
